buyer: Collect photo ID and Social Security Number
Collect last 2 years W2s and tax returns
Send welcome email and set GHL pipeline stage
processing: Order title search and title insurance
Send Closing Disclosure 3 business days before closing
closing: Confirm wire transfer amount with title
Borrower brings valid photo ID to closing
Send congratulations email and request review
